heading: Definitions
label: 4472 Definitions
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 4472 was contained in subchapter C of this chapter prior to repeal by , , .Pub. L. 89–44, title IV, § 40479 Stat. 149June 21, 1965
amendments: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 4472 was contained in subchapter C of this chapter prior to repeal by , , .Pub. L. 89–44, title IV, § 40479 Stat. 149June 21, 1965

children.label: i
children.text: a commercial passenger vessel which extends over 1 or more nights, or

children.label: ii
children.text: a commercial vessel transporting passengers engaged in gambling aboard the vessel beyond the territorial waters of the United States,

children.heading: Exception for certain voyages on passenger vessels
children.label: B Exception for certain voyages on passenger vessels
children.text: The term “covered voyage” shall not include a voyage of a passenger vessel of less than 12 hours between 2 ports in the United States.

children.heading: Passenger vessel
children.label: 2 Passenger vessel
children.text: The term “passenger vessel” means any vessel having berth or stateroom accommodations for more than 16 passengers.
